title: nilgirianthus urceolaris
intro: Nilgirianthus urceolaris, also known as the Nilgiri tuber plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. It is native to the Western Ghats mountain range in India and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Nilgirianthus urceolaris include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or powder, and it can also be used to make a paste for topical application.
